title: Complete the Summary
instructions: Complete the summary below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage.

questions.prompt: According to the WHO, hearing loss is one of the most common chronic conditions and affects over 1.5 billion people worldwide, almost a fifth of the global ____.
Even mild hearing loss can cause people to become socially disengaged and may result in withdrawal from social ____.
Researchers have found that hearing loss is associated with an increased risk of ____ disease.
One possible explanation is damage to small blood vessels, together with processes such as oxidative stress and ____.
A report by the Lancet commission identified hearing loss as one of fourteen known risk factors for ____.
Some researchers argue that the relationship may partly be explained by ____ causation, meaning that dementia itself can affect hearing.
Another theory suggests that the constant effort required to process sounds creates a high cognitive ____.
One promising treatment called Otarmeni is a ____ therapy developed to correct a mutation causing congenital deafness.
Researchers in Australia are also developing a treatment designed to improve the performance of ____ implants.
Until new therapies become widely available, experts recommend having your hearing tested and seeking advice from an ____.
